name: overqualified-still-fits
description: A Staff/Principal engineer (12 yrs) vs a mid-level React role whose stack they clearly cover. Overqualification must NOT tank the score — the candidate can do the job and would plausibly be shortlisted (ADR 0038).
resume: Priya Nair — Staff Frontend Engineer. 12 years building and leading large React + TypeScript web platforms. Architected a design system used by 60+ engineers, drove Next.js migrations, owned performance and accessibility, mentored senior engineers, set frontend technical direction across teams. Deep with Redux, React Query, Jest/Playwright, Webpack/Vite, CI/CD.

job.title: Frontend Engineer (Mid-level)
job.full_description: We're hiring a Frontend Engineer to build features in our React/TypeScript web app. Requirements: 3+ years of React, solid JavaScript/TypeScript, comfortable with REST APIs and component-based UI, and writing tests. Nice to have: Next.js, design systems, performance work. You'll collaborate with product and design to ship user-facing features.
